summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Document Verification feature. All features working correctly including backend API, file uploads, verification processing, results display, exports, search, and clear functionality.

issues: React key warning: Fragment wrapping TableRow items needs a key prop (line 274)

accessibility_issues.issue: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility

passed_tests: Admin login with admin/admin123 credentials - redirects to /upload
Sidebar shows 'Document Verification' as clickable standalone link (not collapsed, not disabled)
Sidebar shows 'Interview Logistics' as greyed out with 'Soon' badge
Cycle Management link does NOT appear in sidebar (removed as expected)
Navigation to /document-verification page renders correctly with two upload zones
Backend API POST /api/docverify/verify works - returns correct verification results
CSV + PDF file uploads work correctly
Run Verification button enabled after file uploads
Verification completes and shows summary cards (Total, Verified, Needs Review, Discrepancy, Missing Doc)
Results table displays candidates with correct status badges
Row expansion shows Match Method and PDF Confidence details
Search/filter functionality in results table works correctly
Export CSV button generates downloadable verification_report.csv
Export JSON button generates downloadable verification_report.json
Clear button resets results and file selections
action_items: MINOR: Fix React key warning in DocumentVerificationPage.js line 274 - add key to Fragment
MINOR: Add DialogTitle to GuidedTour Dialog for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: Fragment wrapping TableRow needs key={`fragment-${i}`} to fix React warning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Verification feature fully tested and working. Backend API at /api/docverify/verify accepts CSV + PDFs via multipart form data. Frontend has full UI with file uploads, verification processing, results display with summary cards, expandable rows, search/filter, and CSV/JSON export. Test files available at /tmp/ for regression testing.
rca_of_the_issue: Previous iteration had endpoint defined after app.include_router() which made it unreachable. This was fixed by moving the endpoint definition before include_router().
